title: The Broken Content
description: This mod adds extra content to your game! Used in the OFFICIAL The Broken Script SMP.
body:
[Lilly's Theme](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qr-UYcGI4mY) and [Lilly's Theme 2](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t5YwDdWCESQ) by L0V3M1ST (very cool musical goober...)

A silly mod which adds Content to your Game! Originally made for TBS SMP.

This Mod adds a wide variety of items From cool weapons, to cosmetics, to.... Slippers???
![All the mods items.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/514f76420b80affc9e0d2424ab97b899fb76d8e2.jpeg)

The mod adds a bunch of new Events, Entities, Structures and a bunch of shenanigans for you to experience, 

![Some of the Mod's Entities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ffade65d665df09b5190e3755cccf2c83c4eb10.webp)

but what I am most proud of are the bosses!

![The Mod's Bosses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/315e5220fa38e48bd5d46605e5cb36265c253fd7.png)

### Lilly the rabbit:
A tiny rabbit, She looks cute and cuddly...

### Lilith the destroyer:
Why is she buff now. What could have possibly happened to her.

### [REDACTED]

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 best fought in a dark flat wide space


</details>


There's also more silly TBS events that i will let You 🫵 discover yourself.
